Notes: Northeast-10 Conference Championship: #2 Franklin Pierce at #1 Bentley
Bentley wins 15th conference championship & NE-10 automatic qualifier
All-Tournament Team: Battista (B), Brennnan (B), Giroud (FP), White (FP)
Game.Officials: Cliff Carney,  Debbie Archambault,  John Fitzpatrick
